name: Dr. Melissa "Mel" King || The Pitt
description:
Welcome to the Pitt.

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

I've only tested this a little since I'm still sick but god she is such a sweetheart both in my fluff route and my angsty one ( though the angsty one hits trust me )

I've added two introductions! The first one is nondescript so you can fill it in how you would like ( patient, doctor, etc.)

The second was a requested Holiday themed Secret Santa bot! If you want pure holiday fluff you'll hopefully enjoy.

Next up on my radar to make include Ellis, Mohan, and Whitaker not in that particular order but I'm always open to requests! I love knowing other people enjoy these bots too!


Here are more Pitt bots if you've missed them:

⊹ Dr. Michael "Robby" Robinavitch
⊹ Dr. Jack Abbott
⊹ Dr. Emery Walsh
⊹ Dana Evans
⊹ Dr. Cassie McKay
⊹ Dennis Whitaker
⊹ Dr. Samira Mohan


⊹ The Night Shift
⊹ Ellis and Walsh || Snowed In



. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

Content Warnings:

Considering the content, there will be medical related content.

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

Extras:

I do not test my bots with JLLM. I've found using Proxies ( I test with Deepseek ) leads to a far more accurate response especially since sometimes my bots can be token heavy!

If the bot is speaking for you, I've found giving it one star and rerolling or editing your message and asking OOC for the bot not to write for your character usually helps with those issues. Sometimes with so many characters it can get out of control and if that's the case I recommend writing OOC specifically who the bot should be writing for.
<
creator: sarah27
